name: Box Shadow Generator
shortDescription: Generate customizable CSS box-shadows with live preview, color selection, opacity controls, inset support, and copy-ready CSS output.
longDescription:
## Box Shadow Generator

A visual CSS box-shadow generator for developers and designers.

### Features

- Adjustable horizontal and vertical shadow offsets
- Blur radius and spread radius controls
- Opacity slider with real-time updates
- Color picker for custom shadow colors
- Normal and inset shadow modes
- Live preview panel showing changes instantly
- One-click copy of generated CSS code
- Responsive and mobile-friendly design
- Works completely offline
